# Zion Tech Group - Robots.txt
# Updated: October 1, 2025

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap-new-posts.xml

# Crawl-delay for specific bots
User-agent: Googlebot
Crawl-delay: 0

User-agent: Bingbot
Crawl-delay: 0

# Block specific paths (if needed)
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /.git/
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /dist/
Disallow: /_app_disabled/
Disallow: /_pages_disabled/
Disallow: /backup/

# Allow specific important content
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /case-studies/
Allow: /services/
Allow: /guides/
Allow: /content/

# SEO Optimization
# Priority content for crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /blog/ai-2025-oct-01-breakthrough-multiagent-orchestration-revolution
Allow: /case-studies/ai-2025-oct-01-global-insurance-multi-agent-transformation-3-2-billion-success
